video_title: How Tracking Became the Default Setting

script_sections.text: Surveillance does not begin with a camera. It begins with convenience.
Apps, brokers, devices, and login systems all leave traces that can be joined into identity.
A metadata trail is just a map of who you were near, when, and how often.
If the system remembers everything, privacy becomes a negotiation.

affiliate_mentions.reason: Helps reduce digital exhaust without pretending one tool fixes everything.
affiliate_mentions.disclosure: Affiliate link may be included in the description.
